creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
I worked a bit with the author on getting the docs as nice as they
are, and they deserve to go in. In fact, without them, you wouldn't
have a snowball's chance in Redmond^H^H^H^H^H^H^HHell of using the
package because it is so chock-full-of-configurable-goodness.

Since the package has no real maintainer, I'd like to take it over. I
was intending to do this one anyway, but someone else beat me to it
while I was doing other stuff.
